Achaea Help Files
Achaea has hundreds of help files to you learn about Achaea. This is a copy of the in-game help file structure. HELP in-game will show you this same menu.
Help:
[
Return to Help Index
]
6.8.2 Trading, and Other Ways to Get and LOSE Things
(See also
HELP SELLING
,
HELP SHOPS
,
HELP MARKET
, HELP CREDIT TRANSFER,
HELP SCAMS
, HELP CREDIT MARKET, and
HELP
COMMS
)
Loans
of
Credits
,
Gold
, or
Anything
Else
----------------------------------------
Loans of any kind are completely unenforceable, either by
you or
Achaean
Administrators
, so they are also particularly risky. We strongly
urge you to avoid all involvement in loans.
To
loan
credits use the LOAN
system
- HELP CREDIT LOANS
Private
Trades
--------------
If you want to
buy
or
trade
privately, outside of
shops
, you can do that too,
though there is some risk of being
conned
or scammed (see HELP
SCAMS
), since
there is no way to force the
other
party
to complete the deal.
Private
Credit
Transactions
---------------------------
You can safely trade credits if you follow the simple steps outlined in HELP
CREDIT TRANSFERS.
Shops
-----
If you want to buy
things
, you can buy at adventurer or
denizen
shops. Prices
may or may not be fair or reasonable, so be careful!
Commodities
-----------
These can be bought and sold freely at comms shops which are scattered across
Sapience
. (See
HELP COMMS
.)
(See also
HELP SELLING
,
HELP SHOPS
,
HELP MARKET
, HELP CREDIT TRANSFER,
HELP CREDIT MARKET, and HELP COMMS)
Achaea is developed and published by
Iron Realms Entertainment.
